name: cc64-web
description: JavaScript reimplementation of the cc64 small-C compiler for C64, targeting browser use with Web64

scripts.test: node test/run6502.test.mjs && node test/scanner.test.mjs && node test/frontend.test.mjs && node test/amalgamate.test.mjs && node test/vasm.test.mjs && node test/linker.test.mjs && node test/compile.test.mjs && node test/d64.test.mjs
